title: What kind of NGE merch would you like to exist
display_title: What kind of NGE merch would you like to exist
wikitext:
[]: What kind of NGE merch would you like to exist?             Quote Post by Rahaquiel-2D1S » Sat Jul 29, 2006 6:38 am Here's one: -Grow your own Rei in the "Reiquarium"(TM)! Put in the small Rei clone into the tank of LCL and watch it grow for the Dummy Plug System! (Sort of like those "grow a dinosaur by adding water" things)

[]:             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Sat Jul 29, 2006 6:54 am That would be horrible to see the Reis grow... By the way, I would really like to see a wearable version of Eva-01's armour. You put that on, and you become Eva-01! It would be good to have a super-solenoid too.

[]:             Quote Post by ZeroFive1 » Sat Jul 29, 2006 2:45 pm tinmeigut wrote: That would be horrible to see the Reis grow... By the way, I would really like to see a wearable version of Eva-01's armour. You put that on, and you become Eva-01! It would be good to have a super-solenoid too.

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Sat Jul 29, 2006 3:36 pm Life size Kaworu model chibi kaworu plushie that doesnt look retarded

[]:             Quote Post by Rahaquiel-2D1S » Sat Jul 29, 2006 4:10 pm Evangelionfreak wrote: Life size Kaworu model

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Sat Jul 29, 2006 4:12 pm Rahaquiel-2D1S wrote: Evangelionfreak wrote: Life size Kaworu model

[]:             Quote Post by Rahaquiel-2D1S » Sat Jul 29, 2006 4:18 pm Oh no, I'm pretty sure I know what you want to do with a life-size Kawrou.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Jul 29, 2006 5:12 pm In similar vein, Rei and Asuka realdolls, because that would at least get us past the awful "Oh god, you know they're going to, some day." sense of forboding.

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Sat Jul 29, 2006 5:36 pm I'd like Keel and HCP Commitee chibi plushies. I'd also like some good action figures of Rei and Keel.

[]:             Quote Post by ZeroFive1 » Sat Jul 29, 2006 6:05 pm Custom plugsuits would also be awesome. THAT ACTUALLY LOOK LIKE PLUGSUITS.

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Sat Jul 29, 2006 6:14 pm Mr. Tines wrote: In similar vein, Rei and Asuka realdolls, because that would at least get us past the awful "Oh god, you know they're going to, some day." sense of forboding.

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Sun Jul 30, 2006 1:34 am "NERV" Sports jerseys with the names of the Eva pilots, with colors and numbers of the Evas.

[]:             Quote Post by felineki » Sun Jul 30, 2006 8:36 am Anything involving Evas and Angels is good, IMO. More of them, fewer Asukas and Reis.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Jul 30, 2006 10:12 am Evangelionfreak wrote: Actually I saw a life size Rei at Otakon last year. I was tempted ut it was $500..I think not

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Sun Jul 30, 2006 7:20 pm I'm still waiting for Gainax to team up with Tokyo Marui and bring us airsoft versions of all the Eva weapons. Heck, TM's already done a certain item from episode 16...

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sun Jul 30, 2006 7:27 pm Mr. Tines wrote: In similar vein, Rei and Asuka realdolls, because that would at least get us past the awful "Oh god, you know they're going to, some day." sense of forboding.

[]:             Quote Post by Eternal Yamcha » Mon Jul 31, 2006 6:02 am Rahaquiel-2D1S wrote: Evangelionfreak wrote: Life size Kaworu model

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Mon Jul 31, 2006 8:29 am A prog. knife with the size of a dagger... Leliel football, though just for fun... Sachiel masks... Small, real fishes looking like Gaghiel... Gendo's white gloves... A Ramiel-looking eight sided dice... A chess with NERV members and Angels... A cross with Lilith on it (though without LCL bleeding from her)... T-shirt with NERV's coat of arms on it (black and red, as usual)... Can't think of more at the moment.

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Mon Jul 31, 2006 8:36 am FauÃŸtin wrote: T-shirt with NERV's coat of arms on it (black and red, as usual)...

[]:             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Mon Jul 31, 2006 8:37 am A prog. knife with the size of a dagger
